name: Occupational Therapy
student_summary: Help people relearn daily life skills after injury or with disability.
overview: Help people relearn daily life skills after injury or with disability. Occupational Therapy sits in the Allied Health family of Healthcare & Medicine. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You draw energy from working closely with people
You feel fulfilled when your work directly helps someone
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply functional assessment to real problems
Collaborate with your team using therapy design
Keep improving at assistive technology — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Hospitals, clinics and care settings — human contact all day
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
alternative_paths: Public-health masters after any life-science degree
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Allied Health foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Occupational Therapy is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of therapy design
projects: Beginner: explore functional assessment with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Therapy tools
books: Where There Is No Doctor (community health)
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Real rural relevance — this field serves or operates in rural India directly.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Physiotherapy: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Special Education: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Speech & Audiology: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Occupational Therapy pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹12 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Biology, Psychology. Typical degrees: BOT, + MOT. Alternatives exist: allied-health diplomas with lateral growth.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Occupational Therapy evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Occupational Therapy is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
